PLTF'S REQUEST FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. E-MAILED INTERPRETER COORDINATOR(S) AT THE HOJ.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-26-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVARES, DIONIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OLIVARES, DIONIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BOLIVAR, GLORIA ON CROSS-COMPLAINT, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.
